title.en: The Replication and Spread of Knowledge

meta.status: draft — 演示样稿，节点与边均待总编辑审定

summary.zh: 两河泥板上的最早成体系书写
summary.en: The earliest systematic writing, pressed into Mesopotamian clay.

summary.zh: 尼罗河的书写材料，古典地中海的知识载体
summary.en: Egypt’s writing surface, carrier of Mediterranean learning.

summary.zh: 殷商占卜刻辞，汉字谱系的起点
summary.en: Shang divination inscriptions, the root of the Chinese script.

summary.zh: 腓尼基商路上的书写简化革命
summary.en: A radical simplification of writing, spread along Phoenician trade routes.

summary.zh: 帕加马的替代材料，耐久而昂贵
summary.en: Pergamon’s durable, costly alternative to papyrus.

summary.zh: 从卷轴到翻页：检索方式的革命
summary.en: From scroll to page-turning: a revolution in retrieval.

summary.zh: 蔡伦改进的廉价书写载体，改变一切复制成本
summary.en: Cai Lun’s cheap writing medium reset the cost of every copy.

summary.zh: 撒马尔罕纸坊：中国工艺进入伊斯兰世界
summary.en: Samarkand mills carry a Chinese craft into the Islamic world.

summary.zh: 整版复制：东亚印刷文明的主干技术
summary.en: Whole-page replication, the mainstay of East Asian print culture.

summary.zh: 布衣毕昇的活字构想，比古腾堡早四百年
summary.en: Bi Sheng’s movable type, four centuries before Gutenberg.

summary.zh: 王祯的木活字与检字工程学
summary.en: Wang Zhen’s wooden type and the ergonomics of typesetting.

summary.zh: 现存最早金属活字印本诞生于高丽
summary.en: The earliest extant metal-type imprints come from Goryeo.

summary.zh: 印刷技术的金融应用：信用被批量复制
summary.en: Printing applied to finance: credit, mass-produced.

summary.zh: 金属活字+压印机+油墨：欧洲的复制引擎
summary.en: Metal type, press and ink: Europe’s replication engine.

summary.zh: 蒸汽驱动的报业机器，大众读者的物质前提
summary.en: Steam-driven newspaper machinery, precondition of the mass reader.

summary.zh: 信息第一次跑赢了信使
summary.en: The first time information outran the messenger.

summary.zh: 一点对亿万人的声音媒介
summary.en: One voice to millions, instantly.

summary.zh: 通用符号机器：一切媒介的最终归宿
summary.en: The universal symbol machine into which all media collapse.

summary.zh: 把复制成本推向零的网络
summary.en: The network that drove the cost of copying toward zero.

summary.zh: 超文本落地为普世出版系统
summary.en: Hypertext realized as a universal publishing system.

summary.zh: 《几何原本》确立的演绎知识范式
summary.en: The deductive ideal of knowledge, codified in Euclid’s Elements.

summary.zh: 以经典复制为轴心的文治体制
summary.en: A polity organized around replicating a canon.

summary.zh: 修道院缮写室维系的知识存续
summary.en: Knowledge kept alive in the scriptorium.

summary.zh: 希腊、波斯、印度学术汇入阿拉伯语世界
summary.en: Greek, Persian and Indian learning poured into Arabic.

summary.zh: 一场由印刷机放大的神学争论
summary.en: A theological quarrel amplified by the press.

summary.zh: 印刷时代的知识管制建制化
summary.en: Knowledge control institutionalized for the age of print.

summary.zh: 跨国界的书信与出版共同体
summary.en: A transnational commonwealth of correspondence and print.

summary.zh: 《安妮法令》：复制权成为财产
summary.en: The Statute of Anne turns the right to copy into property.

summary.zh: 国家把阅读变成义务
summary.en: The state makes reading a duty.

summary.zh: 香农把"信息"变成可度量的量
summary.en: Shannon makes “information” a measurable quantity.

summary.zh: 从Memex到Xanadu：链接式知识的构想
summary.en: From Memex to Xanadu: knowledge as links.

summary.zh: 爱森斯坦：印刷机作为变革动因——本图谱的自我指涉节点
summary.en: Eisenstein’s press as an agent of change — this graph’s self-referential node.

summary.zh: 征服者，也是希腊化知识世界的开启者
summary.en: Conqueror, and opener of the Hellenistic world of learning.

summary.zh: 把知识收藏当作王朝工程的君主
summary.en: The king who made collecting knowledge a dynastic project.

summary.zh: 图书馆鼎盛期的赞助人
summary.en: Patron of the Library at its height.

summary.zh: 把几何编成演绎体系的亚历山大学者
summary.en: The Alexandrian who wove geometry into a deductive system.

summary.zh: 东汉宦官，造纸工艺的改进与奏报者
summary.en: Han court eunuch who perfected and reported papermaking.

summary.zh: 以国库供养翻译的哈里发
summary.en: The caliph who paid for translation from the treasury.

summary.zh: 北宋布衣，活字印刷的发明者
summary.en: A Song commoner, inventor of movable type.

summary.zh: 美因茨金匠，欧洲活字印刷体系的缔造者
summary.en: Mainz goldsmith who built Europe’s printing system.

summary.zh: 研究印刷革命的书籍史家
summary.en: Historian of the printing revolution.

summary.zh: 万维网的发明者，坚持将其免费开放
summary.en: Inventor of the Web, who kept it free.

summary.zh: 托勒密王朝的知识总汇工程
summary.en: The Ptolemies’ project to collect everything.

summary.zh: 巴格达的翻译院与天文台建制
summary.en: Baghdad’s institute of translation and astronomy.

summary.zh: 八万余块经版：雕版时代的国家级复制工程
summary.en: 80,000+ blocks: a state replication project of the woodblock age.

summary.zh: 明帝国的知识总汇：两万余卷类书
summary.en: The Ming empire’s vast compendium of all writing.

summary.zh: 启蒙运动的集体出版奇观
summary.en: The Enlightenment’s collective publishing wonder.

summary.zh: 志愿者共同书写的当代知识奇观
summary.en: A contemporary wonder written by volunteers.

summary.zh: 秦政对思想载体的系统清除
summary.en: The Qin state’s systematic destruction of texts.

summary.zh: 战火与衰败中散佚的古代知识总汇
summary.en: The ancient world’s archive, lost to war and neglect.

summary.zh: 印刷繁荣时代的思想清剿
summary.en: Thought-purges in an age of flourishing print.

summary.zh: 现代国家对书籍的公开火刑
summary.en: A modern state’s public execution of books.

summary.zh: 千丘自由电台：大众媒介被用作屠杀的动员机
summary.en: RTLM: mass media weaponized to mobilize a genocide.

note.zh: 两河与殷商各自独立发明成体系文字
note.en: Mesopotamia and Shang China each invented systematic writing independently

note.zh: 纸草卷轴是馆藏的物质基础
note.en: Papyrus scrolls were the material base of the collection

note.zh: 希腊字母文本传统承载演绎论证
note.en: The Greek alphabetic text tradition carried deductive argument

note.zh: 字母文字令活字字库小而经济
note.en: An alphabet keeps the type case small and economical

note.zh: 帕加马与亚历山大的书写材料之争（替代性并行）
note.en: Pergamum vs Alexandria: rival writing materials in parallel

note.zh: 羊皮耐折叠装订，册子本得以取代卷轴
note.en: Durable, foldable parchment let the codex displace the scroll

note.zh: 修道院缮写室以册子本为标准载体
note.en: Monastic scriptoria standardized on the codex

note.zh: 中世纪抄本的主要材料
note.en: The chief material of medieval manuscripts

note.zh: 汉字文本传统是雕版的文字前提
note.en: The Chinese text tradition was the precondition for woodblock printing

note.zh: 改进工艺并奏报朝廷，使造纸标准化
note.en: Improved the craft and reported it to the throne, standardizing papermaking

note.zh: 廉价的纸是批量印刷的前提
note.en: Cheap paper was the precondition for printing at scale

note.zh: 经籍与科举的标准文本需求拉动印刷
note.en: Canonical texts for the classics and examinations pulled printing demand

note.zh: 造纸术经中亚西传；怛罗斯战俘传艺说存疑
note.en: Papermaking spread west via Central Asia; the Talas prisoner story is doubted

note.zh: 纸使翻译与抄写成本骤降
note.en: Paper slashed the cost of translation and copying

note.zh: 纸经伊斯兰世界与意大利传入欧洲
note.en: Paper reached Europe through the Islamic world and Italy

note.zh: 从整版雕刻到可重组的活字
note.en: From carving whole blocks to recombinable type

note.zh: 沈括《梦溪笔谈》记其法
note.en: Shen Kuo's Dream Pool Essays records his method

note.zh: 王祯以木活字与转轮排字盘改良检字
note.en: Wang Zhen improved typesetting with wooden type and a revolving case

note.zh: 东亚活字谱系内的递进与并行
note.en: Progression and parallel within East Asia's movable-type lineage

note.zh: 金属活字的东西方呼应，无传播证据
note.en: An East-West echo in metal type, with no evidence of transmission

note.zh: 毕昇与古腾堡：独立发明的经典案例
note.en: Bi Sheng and Gutenberg: a classic case of independent invention

note.zh: 印刷技术的金融应用
note.en: A financial application of printing technology

note.zh: 八万经版：雕版技术的极限工程
note.en: Eighty thousand blocks: woodblock printing at its engineering limit

note.zh: 整合铸字、合金、油墨与压印机
note.en: Integrated type-casting, alloy, ink, and the press

note.zh: 檄文与小册子的媒介动员
note.en: Media mobilization by pamphlet and broadsheet

note.zh: 印刷失控催生禁书建制
note.en: Print out of control begat the apparatus of censorship

note.zh: 人人读经的义务推动识字
note.en: The duty to read Scripture pushed literacy

note.zh: 出版网络支撑跨国学术共同体
note.en: Publishing networks sustained a transnational learned community

note.zh: 印刷商利益与作者权利的博弈产物
note.en: Born of the contest between printers' interests and authors' rights

note.zh: 爱森斯坦命题的研究对象
note.en: The subject of Eisenstein's thesis

note.zh: 《作为变革动因的印刷机》(1979)
note.en: The Printing Press as an Agent of Change (1979)

note.zh: 蒸汽动力时代的报业印刷
note.en: Newspaper printing for the steam age

note.zh: 便士报造就大众读者
note.en: The penny press created the mass reader

note.zh: 从有线电讯到无线广播
note.en: From wired telegraphy to wireless broadcasting

note.zh: 编码与信道问题的工程起源
note.en: Coding and channel problems began as engineering

note.zh: 通信与计算共享的理论底座
note.en: The shared theoretical floor of communication and computing

note.zh: 分组交换背后的信息度量
note.en: The information measure behind packet switching

note.zh: 联网的前提是通用计算机
note.en: Networking presupposes the general-purpose computer

note.zh: 万维网运行于互联网之上
note.en: The Web runs on top of the Internet

note.zh: 1989年在CERN提出并实现
note.en: Proposed and built at CERN in 1989

note.zh: Memex与Xanadu设想的工程落地
note.en: Memex and Xanadu made engineering fact

note.zh: 开放网络之上的协作百科
note.en: A collaborative encyclopedia on the open Web

note.zh: 启蒙百科工程的当代回声
note.en: A contemporary echo of the Enlightenment encyclopedia

note.zh: 文人共和国的集大成出版
note.en: The Republic of Letters in one great publication

note.zh: 类书与百科：两种"知识总汇"传统
note.en: Leishu and encyclopedie: two traditions of summing up knowledge

note.zh: 自由许可(Copyleft)对版权逻辑的反转
note.en: Copyleft inverts the logic of copyright

note.zh: 继业者继承帝国与希腊化事业
note.en: The Successors inherited empire and the Hellenizing project

note.zh: 建馆并立"收尽天下之书"之策
note.en: Founded the Library and the policy of collecting all the books in the world

note.zh: 扩藏与供养学者
note.en: Expanded the collection and maintained the scholars

note.zh: 缪斯宫建制供养了欧几里得们
note.en: The Mouseion's establishment sustained the Euclids

note.zh: 《几何原本》十三卷
note.en: The thirteen books of the Elements

note.zh: 以重金延揽译者与学者
note.en: Drew translators and scholars with lavish patronage

note.zh: 翻译运动的建制核心
note.en: The institutional core of the Translation Movement

note.zh: 帝国藏书传统的自觉继承
note.en: A conscious heir to the imperial library tradition

note.zh: 东西方知识浩劫的呼应
note.en: Eastern and Western catastrophes of knowledge in echo

note.zh: 焚书作为文明创伤的跨时空重演
note.en: Book-burning as a recurring trauma of civilization

note.zh: 劫后重建经学，官学化因祸而强；因果强度存争议
note.en: Rebuilding the canon after the fire strengthened official learning; causal weight disputed

note.zh: 出版繁荣与清代思想清剿的关联存争议
note.en: The link from print prosperity to Qing literary inquisition is disputed

note.zh: 千丘自由电台以广播动员屠杀
note.en: Radio Mille Collines mobilized massacre by broadcast

note.zh: 抄本市场培育了书籍需求与工坊
note.en: The manuscript market bred book demand and workshops
